knowledge_type: operational_sequence
title: Parallel Fan-Powered Terminal Unit Control Logic
section_id: 5.8.5
summary: In cooling mode, cooling loop output maps to active airflow setpoint from minimum to cooling maximum; if AHU SAT > room temp, setpoint ≤ minimum. Heating coil off. Parallel fan starts when primary airflow drops below Voz minus half Pfan-z (ASHRAE 62.1) or Zone-Abs-OA-min minus half Pfan-z (Title 24), shuts off when above Voz or Zone-Abs-OA-min. Fan airflow setpoint equals Voz or Zone-Abs-OA-min minus current primary airflow setpoint. In deadband, active primary airflow setpoint = minimum endpoint; heating coil off; fan runs if setpoint below Voz or Zone-Abs-OA-min. In heating, active primary airflow setpoint = minimum; fan runs; heating loop 0-50% resets discharge temp from AHU SAT to MaxΔT above space temp; 50-100% resets fan airflow from deadband value to Pfan-htgmax.
